overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through a sunny residential neighborhood in Los Santos. The player exits a narrow walkway, walks along a sidewalk past palm trees and houses, waits at an intersection for a pedestrian to cross, then continues down a back alley.

events.description: exits narrow walkway between retaining wall and wooden fence onto open sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking from enclosed passage and turning right onto the residential sidewalk

entered.detail: tall beige concrete wall running along left side of walkway
green manicured hedge in front of the retaining wall
tall light brown wooden fence on right side of walkway
wooden telephone pole with crossbars and wires
tall palm tree visible above the buildings in the distance

segments.scene_description: The video begins in a narrow walkway between a concrete retaining wall with hedges on the left and a tall wooden fence on the right. The camera moves forward and turns right onto a residential sidewalk, transitioning from the enclosed passage to the open street.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with sidewalk and palm trees

events.description: black SUV drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk observing the passing traffic and residential buildings

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: two-story orange stucco house with balcony and arched entryway
ornate metal street lamp post with decorative base
black sport utility vehicle driving on the road

segments.scene_description: Walking along the residential sidewalk next to a quiet street lined with palm trees. A black SUV drives past on the road. The camera passes the wooden fence and approaches an orange two-story house with a balcony. The street lamp moves from the center to the left as the camera progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with crosswalk and stop marking

events.description: stops at street corner to wait for pedestrian to cross
pedestrian crosses the street from left to right in front of camera
begins crossing the street after pedestrian clears

agents.ego_description: stopped at corner waiting for pedestrian to clear crosswalk, then crossing the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: two-story light blue house with white trim
black metal gate in front of the orange house driveway
white STOP text painted on the asphalt road

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at the street corner near the orange house with its wrought iron gate. A pedestrian crosses the street from left to right in front of the camera. After the pedestrian clears, the camera begins crossing the street, revealing a blue house across the way and a stop marking painted on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential back alley with garages and utility poles

events.description: enters narrow alleyway from the street intersection
passing person standing near green dumpster on right side

agents.ego_description: walking straight down the narrow cracked asphalt alley between residential buildings and garages

notable_agents.action: person standing near green dumpster looking at phone

entered.detail: row of closed metal garage doors on the left side of alley
red brick apartment building with multiple windows

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow back alley with cracked asphalt surface. The alley is lined with garage doors on the left and a mix of fences and buildings on the right. A green dumpster is visible on the right side, and further down the alley, a person stands near another dumpster looking at their phone. The space is more enclosed with buildings on both sides and overhead wires visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined residential passage into an open sunny street before descending into a narrow urban alley. It begins within a tight walkway between a concrete retaining wall and a wooden fence, moving forward before turning right to emerge onto a wide residential sidewalk. As the camera progresses past palm trees and a passing black SUV, the environment opens up toward an orange two-story house with a wrought iron gate. The movement pauses briefly at a street corner to let a pedestrian cross before proceeding across the asphalt toward a blue house. Finally, the scene shifts from the bright open road into a secluded back alley characterized by cracked pavement, garage doors, and overhead wires, passing a green dumpster and a person on their phone.
